title: Varnish Workspace Client Overflow Detection
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="varnish:log"
| regex _raw="(?i)workspace.*overflow|WS.*overflow"
| stats count by host
| where count >= 1
value: Prevents mysterious 503s during marketing campaigns with huge headers.
implementation: Raise `workspace_client` and hunt oversized cookies or headers.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We find Varnish errors from headers or cookies that are too large.
